ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proceedings" (
  "proceeding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proceeding */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the proceeding */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the discussion */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the discussion */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the proceeding took place */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the proceeding */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the proceeding */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Attachments or documents related to the proceeding */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proceeding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proceedings_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proceedings_speaker FOREIGN KEY ("speaker") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker (e.g., Deputy, Minister) */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or agency the speaker belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the topic */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_bodies" (
  "regulatory_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "regulatory_body_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the regulatory body */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the regulatory body */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "proceeding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proceeding related to the compliance record */,
  "regulatory_body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory body involved */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance status */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for compliance actions */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance action was completed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_proceeding_id FOREIGN KEY ("proceeding_id") REFERENCES proceedings ("proceeding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_regulatory_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulatory_body_id") REFERENCES regulatory_bodies ("regulatory_body_id")
)
